title: Dementia data and intelligence: August 2025 update
body: "Routine monthly update of the 5 indicators in the surveillance factsheet. These interactive factsheets give data for England and integrated care board (ICB) areas.  The ‘estimated dementia diagnosis rate’ indicator, in the ‘diagnosing well and prevalence’ topic of the dementia profile, has been updated with data for 2025. The indicator uses the primary care dementia data published by NHS England. Data is presented for England, health geographies (ICB areas and sub areas) and administrative areas (regions, upper tier and lower tier local authorities).  "
